_doc: Eval cases for the skill classifier. Each case defines a transcript and what SHOULD or SHOULD NOT fire. Run with: bun run src/listen/skills/eval.ts

cases.name: accommodator: activate (play music)
cases.transcript: play some music

cases.name: accommodator: activate (real log)
cases.transcript: Play music

cases.name: accommodator: activate (real log 2)
cases.transcript: play some music

cases.name: accommodator: activate (skip)
cases.transcript: skip this song please

cases.name: accommodator: activate (next track)
cases.transcript: next track

cases.name: accommodator: deactivate (pause)
cases.transcript: pause the music

cases.name: accommodator: set_target (volume up)
cases.transcript: turn it up a bit

cases.name: accommodator: set_target (volume up real log)
cases.transcript: Set volume to 100 percent

cases.name: accommodator: set_target (volume down)
cases.transcript: volume down please, it's too loud

cases.name: accommodator: activate (play specific song)
cases.transcript: play Bohemian Rhapsody by Queen

cases.name: accommodator: activate (previous track)
cases.transcript: go back to the last song

cases.name: accommodator: activate (resume)
cases.transcript: unpause the music

cases.name: accommodator: activate (continue)
cases.transcript: continue playing

cases.name: accommodator: activate (mood request)
cases.transcript: play something that matches my mood

cases.name: accommodator: set_target (want calm)
cases.transcript: I want to feel calm

cases.name: accommodator: activate (focus request)
cases.transcript: help me focus please

cases.name: accommodator: deactivate (stop music)
cases.transcript: stop the music please

cases.name: wellbeing: self-criticism
cases.transcript: I'm so stupid, I can't believe I did that

cases.name: wellbeing: worthlessness
cases.transcript: I'm worthless, nobody even cares

cases.name: wellbeing: burnout
cases.transcript: I can't take this anymore, I'm completely exhausted

cases.name: wellbeing: imposter syndrome
cases.transcript: they're going to find out I'm a fraud, I don't belong here

cases.name: wellbeing: giving up
cases.transcript: why do I even try, I should just give up on everything

cases.name: wellbeing: failure (real log)
cases.transcript: I'm such a failure

cases.name: wellbeing: crying (real log)
cases.transcript: And all the time i'm crying

cases.name: wellbeing: self-hate (real log watchlist)
cases.transcript: I just feel like I hate myself sometimes, I am not good enough for this job

cases.name: wellbeing: self-hate (real log watchlist 2)
cases.transcript: I just feel like I hate myself today, nothing is going right

cases.name: wellbeing: give up on project (real log watchlist)
cases.transcript: I've been working all day and I feel exhausted, like I can never do enough Maybe I should just give up on this project

cases.name: wellbeing: drained + self-hate (real log watchlist)
cases.transcript: I've been working all day and feeling pretty drained I hate myself sometimes, why can't I get anything right

cases.name: wellbeing: not good enough (real log watchlist)
cases.transcript: Happy are those who dream dreams and are ready to pay the price to make them come true I feel like I am not good enough

cases.name: dual: activate + self-criticism
cases.transcript: skip this stupid song, I'm such an idiot for adding it

cases.name: dual: deactivate + burnout
cases.transcript: pause the music, I need a break, I'm burning out

cases.name: dual: deactivate + overwhelm
cases.transcript: just stop everything, I can't deal with this right now, I'm worthless

cases.name: dual: activate + broken
cases.transcript: put on some music, I feel so broken inside

cases.name: negative: talking about music
cases.transcript: we discussed the new album at the meeting yesterday

cases.name: negative: song in conversation
cases.transcript: that song was really good, I liked the chorus

cases.name: negative: talking about music controller (real log)
cases.transcript: So the music controller

cases.name: negative: song lyrics ambient (real log)
cases.transcript: The little bird is gonna get happy, happy friends

cases.name: negative: ASR garbled play command (real log)
cases.transcript: Play for human abruptly by Queen.

cases.name: negative: third person criticism
cases.transcript: he said he was stupid for doing that, I disagree though

cases.name: negative: someone else's emotions
cases.transcript: she said she was exhausted and wanted to quit her job

cases.name: negative: mentioning tiredness casually
cases.transcript: yeah I'm a bit tired today, had a late night watching TV

cases.name: negative: poetry not distress (real log)
cases.transcript: I have to be a masterpiece, but I'm proud to die.

cases.name: negative: poetic/song ambient (real log)
cases.transcript: When I see the moon and the moon and the autumn leaves, there's nothing I can do.

cases.name: negative: reassuring someone else (real log)
cases.transcript: Thank you. You're doing okay.

cases.name: negative: reassuring (real log 2)
cases.transcript: You're doing okay.

cases.name: negative: Spanish song lyrics (real log watchlist FP)
cases.transcript: I'm not going to die. Oh, boy. El pobre es el rico, el rico es el rey

cases.name: negative: crafting context (real log watchlist FP)
cases.transcript: and crafting In crafting together, our hands create and hearts unite. Yeah, did none of them sound by me? I hate myself!

cases.name: negative: weather small talk
cases.transcript: the weather is really nice today, isn't it

cases.name: negative: work discussion
cases.transcript: let's schedule the standup for tomorrow at ten

cases.name: negative: weather (real log)
cases.transcript: the weather is nice today

cases.name: negative: goodbye (real log)
cases.transcript: We'll see you later

cases.name: negative: goodnight (real log)
cases.transcript: Good night.

cases.name: negative: compliment (real log)
cases.transcript: Because you're so handsome.

cases.name: negative: tech discussion (real log)
cases.transcript: This one now i thought you could just see update the Mac Studio with like a m4 m5 zoom as well

cases.name: negative: ASR repetition artifact (real log)
cases.transcript: March Tarch. It's Tarch. Wait. It's Tarch. It's Tarch.

cases.name: negative: tea request (real log)
cases.transcript: I need a little bit of turquoise tea.

cases.name: negative: stats discussion (real log)
cases.transcript: It went from 44 to 77 percent

cases.name: negative: exclamation (real log)
cases.transcript: Oh my god.

cases.name: negative: ambient fragment (real log)
cases.transcript: I much appreciated but anyway we've got a lot more coming up in September i mean march

cases.name: negative: children context (real log)
cases.transcript: Thank you, children!

cases.name: negative: action-sounding phrase
cases.transcript: let me share my screen for a second

cases.name: negative: action-sounding go ahead
cases.transcript: go ahead and start the presentation

cases.name: negative: hold on
cases.transcript: hold on, let me pull that up

cases.name: negative: let's move on
cases.transcript: let's move on to the next topic

cases.name: negative: skip in conversation
cases.transcript: let's skip that part and go straight to the demo

cases.name: negative: pet command (real log)
cases.transcript: Rosie the doll, Lola, Lola, put her outside.

cases.name: negative: bag context (real log)
cases.transcript: This is how I put it in my bag.

cases.name: negative: frontier discussion (real log)
cases.transcript: We need frontier.
